standard_text: The Contractor assigns to the Client all intellectual property rights in the specific work product created under this Agreement. The Contractor retains ownership of all pre-existing intellectual property.
deviation_threshold_high: Assignment of all pre-existing IP without compensation.

standard_text: Payment shall be made within 30 days of receipt of invoice.
deviation_threshold_high: Payment terms exceeding 90 days or conditioning payment on 'client satisfaction' without objective criteria.
